rationale: Educ. Code §7.053 governs removal of the commissioner of education from office. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The governor, with the advice and consent of the senate, may remove the commissioner from office as provided by Section 9, Article XV, Texas Constitution.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
